meta.title: Denfry — Java developer
meta.description: Java developer building server-side Minecraft systems and open-source tooling for AI coding agents.

hero.lead: I build server-side Minecraft systems — plugins, mods, anti-cheat — and open-source tooling for AI coding agents.

about.label: Background
about.text: Networking and information systems, database design, and backend architecture. I run my own Minecraft server, so most projects are tested in real production, not just prototypes.

stack.label: Focus
stack.text: Minecraft (Paper, Spigot, Forge) · Java backend (Spring, PostgreSQL, MySQL) · Python tooling and ML · anti-cheat and behavior analysis · server performance and infrastructure.
